final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of 三国赤壁之战.

Style/medium: needs a "儿童卡通故事" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 上海美术电影制片厂 classic animation heritage, Sanrio educational illustration style, 1990s-2000s Chinese children's book illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge-card format with clear title at top, bullet-point key facts placed alongside the illustration
Subject: must include the story of 三国赤壁之战 presented in cartoon storytelling form
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an engaging, child-friendly atmosphere — exact mood balance is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include clear title and key points with proper punctuation (标题清晰，要点在旁边列好并标点)
Constraints: must be single-card format, content appropriate for children, key points clearly listed alongside illustration
Avoid:
